arts.ttl: Everton vs Liverpool: Possible dates for postponed Merseyside Derby
arts.sum: The Merseyside Derby between Everton and Liverpool has been postponed as Storm Darragh causes disruption across the country. The fixture was due to kick off at 12.30pm UK time on Saturday, 7 December at Goodison Park, but authorities made the decision to call off the game due to safety concerns.
